TemplateVariant: FocusFlow Tech Tool
Project: FocusFlow Landing Page
Audience: Students, professionals, and creators who struggle with distraction
CoreProblem: Constant notifications and context switching break focus and reduce output
CorePromise: Focus deeper. Finish faster.
Tone: Modern, clean, credible, SaaS-style
RequiredSections: Hero, Problem statement, Solution overview, Features grid, Testimonials, Pricing tiers, Call-to-action, Footer
Stack: Static HTML + CSS
Constraint: No JavaScript, no frameworks, no build tools
Deployment: Vercel static hosting
